mapper.select: SELECT * FROM site_config WHERE config_id = #{configId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM site_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM site_config WHERE config_group = #{configGroup} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort
SELECT * FROM site_config WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY config_group, sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_config (config_key, config_value, config_group, description, sort) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configGroup}, #{description}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE site_config
config_value = #{configValue}, config_group = #{configGroup}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort},
WHERE config_id = #{configId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE site_config SET deleted = 1 WHERE config_id = #{configId}
